metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the mambu domain.

children.name: Product Configuration Engine
children.description: Enables teams to model and evolve banking products through configuration rather than code-heavy core changes.

children.name: Modular Domain Architecture
children.description: Provides clear domain boundaries for lending, deposits, payments, and adjacent services so transformation can proceed incrementally.

children.name: Customer and Account Migration Toolkit
children.description: Supports staged data migration, validation, reconciliation, and cutover controls for large banking portfolios.

children.name: Ledger and Accounting Core
children.description: Maintains accurate product-level balances, postings, and accounting events during coexistence and migration.

children.name: API Gateway and Integration Layer
children.description: Exposes secure product and account services to channels and partner systems using a reusable integration backbone.

children.name: Real-time Event Streaming
children.description: Publishes business events so downstream systems can stay synchronized without brittle point-to-point coupling.

children.name: Compliance Rules and Audit Controls
children.description: Applies policy controls, audit trails, and configurable governance needed for regulated financial operations.

children.name: Operational Observability and SLA Monitoring
children.description: Provides production visibility, incident response signals, and service-level evidence required for risk management.

children.name: Deposit Product and Account Lifecycle Management
children.description: Handles account opening, funding, interest, fees, statements, and lifecycle states for deposit propositions.

children.name: Payment Orchestration and Scheme Connectivity
children.description: Coordinates payment workflows and external scheme or processor integrations needed for modern money movement.

children.name: Workflow Automation and Case Management
children.description: Routes operational tasks, approvals, and exceptions so banking operations remain controlled as product volume grows.

children.name: Analytics and Portfolio Insights
children.description: Provides cohort, product, and performance analytics so the bank can iterate based on actual customer and business outcomes.

children.name: Loan Product and Servicing Engine
children.description: Supports configurable loan structures, repayment plans, servicing states, and policy changes across lending products.

children.name: Pricing and Policy Rules
children.description: Allows credit and commercial teams to evolve rates, fees, and eligibility rules without rebuilding core workflows.

children.name: Origination and Decisioning Workflow
children.description: Coordinates application intake, status progression, and decision outcomes across direct and partner channels.

children.name: Partner and Channel Integration Layer
children.description: Exposes APIs and onboarding controls for merchants, brokers, or embedded-finance partners.

children.name: Servicing Operations Workspace
children.description: Gives operations teams a controlled workspace for repayment changes, reschedules, and manual interventions.

children.name: Collections and Delinquency Management
children.description: Supports arrears workflows, customer treatment paths, and collections actions required for healthy portfolio operations.

children.name: Portfolio Analytics and Cohort Reporting
children.description: Shows growth, delinquency, yield, and servicing economics by segment so product and risk leaders can react early.

children.name: Reusable Product Templates
children.description: Speeds cross-market rollout by reusing proven lending product blueprints with controlled local variation.

children.name: Governance, Risk, and Audit Controls
children.description: Ensures lending operations remain traceable, policy-compliant, and reviewable as the business expands.

children.name: Tenant and Environment Management
children.description: Supports structured separation, configuration, and promotion across environments and operating units.

children.name: Unit Economics and Margin Analytics
children.description: Connects lending volumes to margin, servicing cost, and collections effort so expansion decisions stay grounded.

bricks.name: Fintechs, BaaS, and Embedded Finance Providers

children.name: Partner Onboarding and Tenant Setup
children.description: Standardizes how new partners are provisioned, configured, and governed so scale does not require custom operational playbooks.

children.name: Multi-tenant Runtime Controls
children.description: Maintains tenant isolation, configuration boundaries, and operational control across many partner programs.

children.name: Developer Platform and Public APIs
children.description: Provides secure, documented, and consumable APIs for accounts, lending, payments, and servicing actions.

children.name: Webhook and Event Distribution
children.description: Allows partners to react to real-time banking events without polling or manual reconciliation.

children.name: Partner Operations Hub
children.description: Centralizes operational servicing, case handling, and exception management across partner programs.

children.name: Reconciliation and Settlement Controls
children.description: Keeps balances, movements, and commercial obligations consistent across internal and external parties.

children.name: Partner Revenue and Performance Analytics
children.description: Connects partner activity to revenue, margin, adoption, and operational cost for platform steering.

children.name: Composable Product Domain Reuse
children.description: Lets the provider assemble new partner propositions from reusable lending, deposits, and payments modules.

children.name: Proposition Bundling and Packaging
children.description: Supports quick creation of reusable product packages aligned to partner types and go-to-market motions.

children.name: Security, Audit, Compliance, and Resilience
children.description: Keeps platform growth aligned with regulated operating expectations and partner trust requirements.

children.name: Ecosystem Demand and Value Intelligence
children.description: Surfaces which partner needs, propositions, and integrations create the most strategic value.
